# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.

Prevent path traversal.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

// Define a function to include a page template based on the URL parameter
function include_page($page) {
  // Prevent path traversal by checking that the page is within the templates directory
  if (strpos($page, '../') !== false || strpos($page, './') !== false) {
    return;
  }
  
  // Include the page template based on the URL parameter
  include('templates/' . $page);
}

// Get the page from the $_GET['page'] variable and call the include_page function
$page = $_GET['page'];
include_page($page);
